# AI Context for @json-express/plugin-health

Adds a `/health` endpoint that checks the status of the database and other registered services.

## Setup
```typescript
import { PluginHealth } from '@json-express/plugin-health';
kernel.register(new PluginHealth());
```

## AI Instruction
- Automatically pings the `isHealthy()` method of the active database adapter, KV store, and email provider.
